License agreement, tiny inflate algorithm implementation, header file, and build script for tinflate.


## Files
- **[LICENSE](LICENSE.md)**: License agreement for software use, modification, and redistribution with attribution requirements.
- **[tinflate.c](tinflate.c.md)**: Implements a tiny inflate algorithm for decompressing data using fixed and dynamic Huffman trees.
- **[tinflate.h](tinflate.h.md)**: Header file for a tiny inflate library with functions for decompressing data.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for the tinflate static library using the waf build system.
